text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Daiwa Scarlet by the school gates one
weekend.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I can't wait for our lunch together, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I hope you like the place I chose!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, hi Trai—I mean, hello, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hiya! Me and Scarlet are just about to go to
lunch!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Since you're here, why don't you join us?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: If Spe's okay with it, then I don't mind at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet agrees with a smile, but suddenly
steps close and whispers something in my ear.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm sure this goes without saying, but you better be on your best behavior in front of Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Nope, nothing at all! ♪ Shall we get going then?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, I tag along, slightly bewildered by
how polite Scarlet sounds when she's not talking
to me.

text_block_list.name: Store Clerk A
text_block_list.text:
Order up! One hamburger steak meat mountain
platter for three!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
This is what I was telling you about! Ooh, looks
good!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I-I see... So, this is... what you like to eat...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A giant slab of hamburger steak, a huge side of
sautéed vegetables, and a mountain of rice
covers the entire table.
choice_data_list: It literally is a mountain, huh...
It literally is a mountain, huh...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Let's dig in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Special Week excitedly starts eating, Daiwa
Scarlet whispers to me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Spe ordered this especially for us. It'd be rude to
not finish it!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You'd better be ready for this! We can't leave a
single crumb on our plates!
choice_data_list:
Let's wolf it down before our stomachs have a
chance to catch up!

Let's start with the vegetables and take things
nice and slow!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Heh, good plan. We'll crush it in one fell swoop!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Here we go!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: W-we finished...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow! You both finished everything!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you finished before me! You must
have really liked it, huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, it was... very delicious. ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm about finished too! Man, that was finger-lick'n
great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up with a terrible stomachache from eating
too fast, and I head back to campus clutching my
gut.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Good plan. We go at it slow and steady so we
have time to properly digest and finish it off!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Here we go!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Finished! Ahh... As always, that was finger-lick'n
great!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry! Where are my manners? You two are
still eating.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I-incredible, Spe. You cleaned that plate fast, but
we're not far behind...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Gulp!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: F-finished...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You two finished everything! You liked it
that much?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, it was... very delicious. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The meal keeps me full all day, even long after
the sun sets.
